name: antigravity-autopilot
description: Full autopilot for your AI coding agent — auto-retry, auto-continue, safe command approval, and rate limit handling

autopilot.cdpPort.description: Custom CDP port. Set to 0 (default) to auto-detect from common ports (9222, 9000-9003).

autopilot.autoRetry.description: Auto-click Retry when the agent encounters an error

autopilot.autoContinue.description: Auto-click Continue when the agent pauses mid-generation

autopilot.autoRun.description: Auto-approve safe terminal commands. Dangerous commands matching the blocklist are always skipped. (Opt-in)

autopilot.runBlocklist.description: Commands containing any of these patterns will never be auto-approved by Auto-Run

autopilot.rateLimitHandler.description: Auto-wait and retry when the AI provider returns a rate limit error

autopilot.showStats.description: Show session action counts in the status bar tooltip
